title: F&B Supervisor #81437
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Hotel Accommodation
  • Position Title: F&B Supervisor
  • Working Location: City Hall
  • Working Hours: Shift Work (5-days Work Week)
  • Salary Package: Basic $2500 - $3000
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Coordinate and support opening/closing tasks, and make sure all setup is done to standards and procedures before operations start.
  • Plan the outlet’s daily operations when the Manager is not around.
  • Support management in supervising junior staff and temporary staff in your area, and ensure tasks are completed on time and to instructions and department standards.
  • Take and record reservations/cancellations based on department standards, and confirm bookings by phone or email daily.
  • Provide food and beverage service in line with department standards and procedures.
  • Recommend and promote food and beverage offerings when appropriate, and suggest other dining venues when the outlet is full.
  • Follow required precautions for the hotel’s food safety and hygiene standards (HACCP).
  • Support smooth operations by ensuring there are enough supplies, materials, and equipment.
  • Handle guest feedback and concerns professionally and efficiently, and report issues, incidents, or unusual situations to management.
  • Supervise and support activities at your assigned station, and oversee outlet operations when management is not present.
  • Support other Food & Beverage outlets during peak periods or when needed.
  • Check outlet and back-of-house cleanliness to ensure it meets F&B sanitation and hygiene requirements.
  • Keep up-to-date knowledge of food and beverage services, ingredients, preparation methods, outlets, and hotel services/features.
  • Be familiar with the hotel’s fire, life safety, and emergency procedures.
  • Check outlet and back-of-house cleanliness to ensure it meets F&B sanitation and hygiene requirements.
  • Follow proper purchasing and requisition procedures.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Minimum 2 years’ relevant experience in a similar role.
  • Basic MS Excel, Word, and PowerPoint skills.
  • Secondary/High school qualification; F&B certifications are a plus.
  • Strong communication and customer service skills.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #81437 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
